name: collegechoice
description: College Choice — India's college discovery, comparison & application platform

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w @collegechoice/api" "npm run dev -w @collegechoice/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @collegechoice/api && npm run build -w @collegechoice/web
